article_theme: InferenceXv2 provides a comprehensive, open-source benchmark for AI inference, revealing that while AMD's MI355X shows competitive performance with advanced optimizations like WideEP and Disaggregated Serving, Nvidia's B200 and software ecosystem still maintain a significant lead in mature production environments.
structure_summary: The article begins by introducing InferenceXv2 and its core objectives, followed by a technical primer on crucial inference concepts (Interactivity vs Throughput, Parallelism strategies, Disaggregated Serving). It then deep-dives into benchmark results for DeepSeek R1 and GPT-OSS, comparing Nvidia and AMD across various configurations. The latter half unpacks the hardware/software ecosystems (Blackwell, MI355X, TRTLLM, ATOM), discusses recent InferenceX repository updates (including the use of AI coding assistants), and outlines future development plans.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.section_role: Establishes the technical baseline and metadata, signaling to the reader that this is a high-level, authoritative piece covering cutting-edge AI hardware and software frameworks.
translation_notes: Keep hardware SKUs (GB300 NVL72, MI355X) and software frameworks (SGLang, vLLM, TRTLLM) in English.
Translate 'Disaggregated Serving' as '分离式服务' or '解耦服务' and 'Wide Expert Parallelism' as '宽泛专家并行' or '大规模专家并行', ensuring consistency throughout the text.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.next_section_title: Key Observations and Results to Highlight
sections.section_role: Defines the value proposition of InferenceXv2, framing it as a dynamic, open-source solution to the problem of outdated, static AI benchmarks.
translation_notes: Translate 'point-in-time benchmarks' as '特定时间点的静态基准测试' to emphasize the contrast with continuous testing.
Ensure the rebranding from 'InferenceMAX' to 'InferenceXv2' is clearly articulated without causing reader confusion.

sections.title: Key Observations and Results to Highlight
sections.next_section_title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters
sections.section_role: Delivers the core thesis of the article: AMD is catching up in isolated software configurations, but Nvidia maintains a dominant lead in mature, composable production environments.
translation_notes: The slang 'framemog' is highly informal and aggressive tech-slang meaning to completely dominate in performance. Translate dynamically, e.g., '绝对碾压' or '在帧率/吞吐量上形成降维打击'.
Translate 'composability' as '可组合性' or '组合能力', a crucial concept for AMD's software stack critique.

sections.title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters
sections.previous_section_title: Key Observations and Results to Highlight
sections.next_section_title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.section_role: Builds institutional credibility by detailing the scale of the testing environment (1000+ GPUs) and Nvidia's direct hardware support.
translation_notes: Maintain a professional and respectful tone for the acknowledgments.
Translate 'Pushing Pareto Frontier' as '推动帕累托前沿' or '突破帕累托最优边界'.

sections.title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.previous_section_title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters
sections.section_role: Acts as a structural signpost to manage reader expectations, separating the executive summary from the deep technical dive.
translation_notes: Translate 'primer' as '入门指南' or '基础知识科普'.
Keep the tone inviting for beginners but objective enough not to alienate experts.

sections.title: Interactivity vs Throughput Tradeoff
sections.previous_section_title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.next_section_title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Explains the primary economic and performance trade-off in LLM inference, establishing the metrics by which Nvidia and AMD are being judged.
translation_notes: Ensure strict consistency for acronyms: 'Interactivity' -> '交互性/响应速度', 'TPOT' -> '每个输出Token耗时 (TPOT)'.
Translate 'Disaggregated prefill' as 'Prefill/Decode分离' or '预填充解耦', as this is standard Chinese AI infrastructure terminology.

sections.title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Defines the distributed inference techniques that dictate the performance bottlenecks for both AMD and Nvidia.
translation_notes: Use standard Chinese distributed computing terminology: 'all-reduce' -> '全归约', 'all-to-all collective' -> '全局到全局集合通信', 'shards experts' -> '专家分片'.

sections.title: Tracking Improvements Over Time
sections.previous_section_title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Explains the temporal methodology of InferenceXv2, highlighting the disparity between hardware release cycles and software iteration speeds.
translation_notes: Translate 'O(yearly) cadence' and 'O(weekly) cadence' as 'O(年)级更新节奏' and 'O(周)级迭代频率', preserving the Big O notation commonly used by engineers.
Translate 'recipes' contextually as '部署方案' or '配置配方'.

sections.title: DeepSeek R1
sections.section_role: Provides a concrete case study demonstrating AMD's rapid software progress on a SOTA model, validating the need for continuous benchmarking.
translation_notes: Translate 'upstreaming' as '向上游提交' or '合并至主分支', and 'forked SGLang images' as 'SGLang分支镜像'.
Ensure the tone emphasizes the sheer velocity of AMD's software improvements.
